  for subj, items in groups.items():
          # No special handling; treat all predicates uniformly
          subject_phrase = subj
          remaining_items = items
  
          descriptors = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in remaining_items]
          if not descriptors:
              # Only nationality present
              sentences.append(f"{subject_phrase}.")
              continue
          if len(descriptors) == 1:
              sent = f"{subject_phrase} {descriptors[0]}."
          else:
              # Join all but last with commas
              body = ", ".join(descriptors[:-1])
              # Add final part with conjunction
              sent = f"{subject_phrase} {body}, and {descriptors[-1]}."
          sentences.append(sent)
